'''zatusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leachable|leachable]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leachable|leachable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zatusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zætisith|zætisith]] || [[word:zætisij|zætisij]] || [[word:zætisish|zætisish]] || [[word:zætisi|zætisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zatutusuth|zatutusuth]] || [[word:zatutusuj|zatutusuj]] || [[word:zatutusush|zatutusush]] || [[word:zatutusu|zatutusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zatusuth|zatusuth]] || [[word:zatusuj|zatusuj]] || [[word:zatusush|zatusush]] || [[word:zatusu|zatusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zatufsuth|zatufsuth]] || [[word:zatufsuj|zatufsuj]] || [[word:zatufsush|zatufsush]] || [[word:zatufsuf|zatufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zatusuthu|zatusuthu]] || [[word:zatusuju|zatusuju]] || [[word:zatusushu|zatusushu]] || [[word:zatusuku|zatusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zatusuth|zatusuth]] || [[word:zatusuj|zatusuj]] || [[word:zatusush|zatusush]] || [[word:zatusu|zatusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zatusuthul|zatusuthul]] || [[word:zatusujul|zatusujul]] || [[word:zatusushul|zatusushul]] || [[word:zatusukul|zatusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zatusuthuthu|zatusuthuthu]] || [[word:zatusujuju|zatusujuju]] || [[word:zatusushushu|zatusushushu]] || [[word:zatusuku|zatusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zatusuthun|zatusuthun]] || [[word:zatusujun|zatusujun]] || [[word:zatusushun|zatusushun]] || [[word:zatusukun|zatusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zatusuthuoro|zatusuthuoro]] || [[word:zatusujuoro|zatusujuoro]] || [[word:zatusushuoro|zatusushuoro]] || [[word:zatusukuoro|zatusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
